title: BEM-538 runtime dispatch bridge audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem538')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM538_RUNTIME_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_BRIDGE.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Audit repository for dispatch bridge / workflow endpoints / role orchestrator / provider adapter runtime paths.
scan_roots = ['governance', '.github/workflows']
files = []
for root in scan_roots:
    p = Path(root)
    if p.exists():
        for f in p.rglob('*'):
            if f.is_file():
                files.append(f)
terms = ['workflow_dispatch','dispatch','role-orchestrator','provider-adapter','codex-task','codex-status','github actions','runtime','endpoint','deno','transport_consumer','provider_adapter_result']
hits = []
for f in sorted(files, key=lambda x: str(x)):
    txt = f.read_text(errors='ignore')
    low = txt.lower()
    found = []
    for term in terms:
        if term in low or term in str(f).lower():
            found.append(term)
    if found:
        hits.append({'file': str(f), 'terms': found, 'bytes': len(txt)})

workflow_checks = {}
for wf_name in ['.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml', '.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml', '.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml', '.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml', '.github/workflows/claude.yml']:
    wf = Path(wf_name)
    txt = wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
    low = txt.lower()
    workflow_checks[wf_name] = {
      'exists': wf.exists(),
      'workflow_dispatch': 'workflow_dispatch' in low,
      'schedule': 'schedule:' in low,
      'has_inputs': 'inputs:' in low,
      'transport_write': 'results.jsonl' in low,
      'state_write': 'role_cycle_state.json' in low or 'provider_contour_state.json' in low,
      'issue_31': '#31' in low or 'issue_number: 31' in low
    }

role_ready = workflow_checks['.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml']['exists'] and workflow_checks['.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml']['workflow_dispatch'] and workflow_checks['.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml']['has_inputs']
provider_ready = workflow_checks['.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml']['exists'] and workflow_checks['.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml']['workflow_dispatch'] and workflow_checks['.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml']['has_inputs']
bridge_ready = False
for h in hits:
    if 'codex-task' in h['terms'] and 'workflow_dispatch' in h['terms']:
        bridge_ready = True

roadmap.write_text('# BEM-538 | Runtime Workflow Dispatch Bridge Roadmap\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:41 (UTC+3)\n\n## Цель\nДовести проверку внутреннего контура от file-level synthetic consumer test до workflow-level runtime orchestration: dispatch `role-orchestrator.yml` and `provider-adapter.yml` с входами и проверкой transport/state результата.\n\n## Исходная точка\nBEM-537 доказал, что exchange file читается consumer-логикой и порождает adapter reaction внутри Python executor v3. Не доказан отдельный runtime dispatch role-orchestrator/provider-adapter workflows.\n\n## Roadmap\n\n### BEM-538.1 — Runtime dispatch readiness audit\nПроверить наличие `workflow_dispatch`, inputs, no forbidden issue #31, transport/state writes.\nPASS: audit report, workflow checks, blocker decision.\n\n### BEM-538.2 — Dispatch bridge contract\nФормализовать разрешённый bridge: Deno endpoint или existing dispatcher должен уметь запускать `role-orchestrator.yml` and `provider-adapter.yml`. Если bridge отсутствует — создать spec/blocked item, не имитировать live dispatch.\nPASS: contract/spec, exact blocker if bridge absent.\n\n### BEM-538.3 — Workflow-level synthetic dispatch proof\nЕсли bridge available: dispatch role-orchestrator then provider-adapter, verify transport/state. Если bridge absent: record blocker and next required implementation step.\nPASS: real workflow SHA/result OR exact blocker.\n')

hit_lines = []
for h in hits[:120]:
    hit_lines.append('- ' + h['file'] + ': terms=' + ','.join(h['terms']) + ', bytes=' + str(h['bytes']))

status = 'PASS' if role_ready and provider_ready else 'BLOCKER'
report = reports/'bem538_1_runtime_dispatch_readiness_audit.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-538.1 | Runtime Dispatch Readiness Audit | ' + status + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:41 (UTC+3)\n\n## Workflow checks\n```json\n' + json.dumps(workflow_checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Readiness\n| Component | Ready |\n|---|---|\n| role-orchestrator workflow_dispatch inputs | ' + str(role_ready) + ' |\n| provider-adapter workflow_dispatch inputs | ' + str(provider_ready) + ' |\n| dispatch bridge detected in repo scan | ' + str(bridge_ready) + ' |\n\n## Repository hits\n' + ('\n'.join(hit_lines) if hit_lines else 'none') + '\n\n## Conclusion\nWorkflows are ' + ('ready' if role_ready and provider_ready else 'not ready') + ' for runtime dispatch. Dispatch bridge availability: ' + str(bridge_ready) + '.\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if status == 'PASS' else 'role-orchestrator or provider-adapter workflow not dispatch-ready') + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem538_1_runtime_dispatch_readiness_audit.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-538.1 ' + status + ': role_ready=' + str(role_ready) + ', provider_ready=' + str(provider_ready) + ', bridge_ready=' + str(bridge_ready) + '\n')

# State marker.
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
contour = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:41 (UTC+3)'
contour['bem538_runtime_dispatch_readiness'] = {'role_ready': role_ready, 'provider_ready': provider_ready, 'bridge_ready': bridge_ready, 'status': status}
contour['blocker'] = None if status == 'PASS' else contour.get('blocker')
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

changed_files.extend([str(roadmap), str(report), str(proof), str(state_path)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-538.1 audited runtime workflow dispatch readiness')
"""
No issue comments.
